# LipSync — Complete Research Merge

*Generated by deep analysis of the repository at `s-soltys/LipSync`*

---

## 1. Project Identity

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Repository** | `s-soltys/LipSync` — `git@github.com:s-soltys/LipSync.git` |
| **Description** | Real-time facial animation generator for 3D models driven by input audio |
| **Language** | ActionScript 3 (Adobe Flex/AIR) |
| **Target Platform** | Adobe AIR / Flash Player 10.0.0 |
| **Author** | Szymon Sołtysiak (s-soltys) |
| **License** | Unlicense (public domain) |
| **Original development** | December 2015 (single bulk import of 56 files, 3,274 lines) |
| **IDE** | FlashDevelop (`.as3proj` project format) on Windows |
| **Compiler** | Flex SDK (strict mode, optimizations enabled, traces omitted in release) |

## 2. Project Structure

```
LipSync/
├── Lipsync.as3proj                    # FlashDevelop project file
├── Lipsync.lxml                       # SWC component packaging config
├── .gitignore                          # Ignores bin/, bin-debug/, bin-release/, .settings/
├── LICENSE                             # Unlicense
├── README.md                          # Project description + YouTube link + references
├── obj/
│   ├── LipsyncConfig.xml              # Flex compiler config (release build)
│   ├── LipsyncConfig.old              # Identical copy
│   └── Lipsync.flex.compc.xml        # Flex compiler config (SWC library)
├── lib/
│   ├── network_image                  # Serialized neural network (16,137 bytes, zlib-compressed)
│   ├── male/                          # 5 MP3 files: aeiou, count, example, lipsync, speech
│   ├── female/                        # 5 MP3 files: aeiou, count, example, lipsync, speech
│   ├── lipsync/                       # ❌ MISSING — expected: network_image_m, network_image_f
│   ├── xml/                           # ❌ MISSING — expected: avatar_default.xml
│   └── model/                         # ❌ MISSING — expected: model.dae, model_man.dae, 4x .jpg textures
├── src/
│   ├── lipsync/
│   │   ├── core/
│   │   │   ├── LipsyncSettings.as     # Global constants
│   │   │   ├── lpc/LP.as              # LPC feature extraction
│   │   │   ├── network/NeuralNetwork.as  # MLP neural network
│   │   │   ├── network/Neuron.as      # Single neuron
│   │   │   ├── phoneme/Phoneme.as     # Phoneme data class
│   │   │   └── phoneme/PhonemeCollection.as # Static phoneme registry
│   │   ├── player/
│   │   │   ├── LipsyncPlayer.as       # Audio playback + phoneme recognition
│   │   │   ├── LipsyncEvent.as        # Event definitions
│   │   │   └── LipsyncBufferItem.as   # Buffer item data class
│   │   ├── training/
│   │   │   ├── LipsyncCreator.mxml    # Main MXML UI entry point
│   │   │   ├── LipsyncTrainer.as      # Training controller
│   │   │   ├── TrainingPattern.as     # Training pattern data class
│   │   │   └── generator/
│   │   │       ├── TrainingPatternGenerator.as  # Generates training data from audio
│   │   │       ├── SampleProvider.as  # Audio sample extraction
│   │   │       └── ProviderEvent.as   # Sample provider events
│   │   └── util/ (from util package) — location varies in source
│   ├── avatar3D/
│   │   ├── AvatarCore.as              # Base avatar class
│   │   ├── AvatarBuilder.as           # Factory from XML config
│   │   ├── AvatarAnimator.as          # Extends AvatarCore, drives lip-sync
│   │   ├── core/
│   │   │   ├── AvatarFeature.as       # Wraps one bone with 6 DOF
│   │   │   ├── BoneParameter.as       # Interface for bone axes
│   │   │   └── bone/
│   │   │       ├── BoneRot.as         # Rotation axis implementation
│   │   │       └── BoneMov.as         # Translation axis implementation
│   │   ├── face/
│   │   │   ├── mouth/AvatarMouth.as   # 14-feature mouth system
│   │   │   ├── eyes/AvatarEye.as      # Eyelid, eyeball, 2 eyebrows
│   │   │   └── neck/AvatarNeck.as     # Two-segment neck
│   │   └── expression/
│   │       ├── AvatarExpression.as     # Expression data class (14 params)
│   │       ├── ExpressionsCollection.as # Static registry: 7 emotions + N visemes
│   │       └── setting/ExpressionParameter.as # XML-driven param parser
│   ├── editor/
│   │   └── LipsyncEditorWindow.as     # Main editor SWF (500×700)
│   ├── scenes/
│   │   ├── ColladaTestScene.as        # Test scene: avatar + audio
│   │   ├── LipsyncTestScene.as        # Minimal NN test (no 3D)
│   │   └── SetupVisemeScene.as        # Viseme tuning test
│   ├── generic3D/
│   │   ├── AvatarScene.as            # View3D wrapper (Away3D)
│   │   └── collada/AvatarModelProvider.as  # Collada DAE import
│   └── util/
│       ├── NeuralNetworkProvider.as   # Embed/deserialize NN binaries
│       ├── LookAtPoint.as             # Smooth gaze tracker (EMA)
│       ├── Label.as                   # Clickable text label component
│       ├── DAECompressor.as           # Collada deflation utility
│       ├── AvatarXMLProvider.as       # Embed/parse avatar config XML
│       └── AvatarDebugger.as          # Static trace logging ([LOG], [DEBUG], [ERROR])
```

**Package namespaces:**
- `pl.lipsync.*` — core engine
- `avatar3D.*` — 3D avatar
- `generic3D.*` — 3D infrastructure
- `editor.*`, `scenes.*` — entry points
- `util.*` — utilities

## 3. Build Configuration

### Lipsync.as3proj (FlashDevelop)

| Setting | Value |
|---|---|
| Output type | Application (SWF) |
| Output path | `bin\Lipsync.swf` |
| Frame rate | 30 fps |
| Stage size | 850 × 550 px |
| Target Flash version | 10.0.0 |
| Platform | AIR |
| Background | #FFFFFF |
| Entry point | `src\lipsync\training\LipsyncCreator.mxml` |
| Source classpath | `src` |
| Hidden paths | `obj` |

**Compiler flags:** strict=true, optimize=true, omitTraces=true

### Lipsync.lxml (SWC packaging)

Builds `bin/Lipsync.swc` for third-party consumption. Excludes training UI classes from SWC. SWC includes 13 classes: all core engine (settings, LPC, NN, phoneme, player, training patterns/generator) — excludes 3D avatar and editor code.

### Build constants (in LipsyncSettings.as)

| Constant | Value | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| `outputCount` | 6 | Output neuron count (binary viseme encoding width) |
| `samplingDecimate` | 6 | Downsample by factor 7 (keep every 7th sample) |
| `samplingRate` | 44100 Hz | Input audio rate |
| `samplingRateMS` | 44.1 | Samples/ms |
| `windowLength` | 18 ms | Analysis window |
| `recognizePhonemeDelay` | 20 ms | Interval between phoneme recognitions |
| `activationEnergy` | 0.025 | Energy threshold for VAD |

### Compilation constants (from obj/LipsyncConfig.xml)
- `CONFIG::release = true`, `CONFIG::debug = false`
- `CONFIG::timeStamp = '2011-08-24'`
- Source path includes: `C:\Users\Szymon\Desktop\AS3\Lipsync\src` + FlashDevelop AS3 library on drive D:

---

## 4. Core Algorithm Pipeline

### 4.1 LPC Feature Extraction (`LP.as`)

**Order:** 9 (produces 9 reflection coefficients → input to NN)

**Processing chain:**
1. **Window:** Hamming window (`0.54 - 0.46*cos(2πn/(N-1))`) — other windows (Hanning, Blackman, Blackman-Harris) are commented out
2. **Pre-emphasis:** λ = 0.0 (disabled — hardcoded)
3. **Autocorrelation:** Iterative lattice-style (Burg-like) recursion — not standard two-pass
4. **Coefficient computation:** Durbin-Levinson recursion → reflection (PARCOR) coefficients
5. **Normalisation:** Commented out (coefficients are NOT normalised to [0,1])

### 4.2 Neural Network (`NeuralNetwork.as`, `Neuron.as`)

**Architecture:** Fully-connected MLP
- **Input layer:** 9 neurons (LPC reflection coefficients)
- **Hidden layers:** 2 (neurons per layer = user-configurable)
- **Output layer:** 6 neurons (binary-encoded viseme ID, 2⁶ = 64 values)
- **Activation:** Logistic sigmoid `σ(z) = 1/(1 + e^(-z))`
- **Weight init:** Uniform[-1, 1] (bias = +1.0)

**Training (backpropagation with momentum):**
- **Momentum μ:** 0.5
- **Learning rate η:** User-configurable, adaptively scaled each epoch: `η_epoch = η_0 × MSE`
- **Stopping:** MSE ≤ targetMSE (default 0.02) or max epochs
- **Shuffle:** Fisher-Yates per epoch
- **Persistence:** Binary format (zlib-compressed ByteArray) — stores config + all weights/biases/momentums

### 4.3 Phoneme Model (`Phoneme.as`, `PhonemeCollection.as`)

**18 phonemes** across **9 viseme groups** (v1–v9), each with a/b variants:

| Viseme Group | IDs (a, b) | Viseme ID |
|---|---|---|
| v1 | 2, 3 | 1 |
| v2 | 6, 7 | 2 |
| v3 | 10, 11 | 3 |
| v4 | 14, 15 | 4 |
| v5 | 20, 21 | 5 |
| v6 | 30, 31 | 6 |
| v7 | 40, 41 | 7 |
| v8 | 52, 53 | 8 |
| v9 | 62, 63 | 9 |

+ 1 NULL phoneme (id=0)

**Encoding:** Big-endian binary over `outputCount` bits. Decoded with ≥0.5 threshold.

### 4.4 Training Data Generation

- **Samples per phoneme:** 40
- **Jitter factor:** ±10% around uniform steps
- **Training files (male voice):** `aeiou.mp3` (phonemes v3a/b, v7a/b, v1a/b, v6a/b, v5a/b) and `example.mp3` (v2a/b, v4a/b)

### 4.5 Player Pipeline (`LipsyncPlayer.as`)

1. **Audio extraction:** `Sound.extract(buffer, 794 samples, position_ms)` — 32-bit float
2. **Decimation:** Keep every 7th sample (samplingDecimate=6), producing ~113 samples per window
3. **Energy (VAD):** Σ|sample| / N, threshold 0.025
4. **Pre-buffering:** Entire phoneme buffer computed before playback starts (step = 882 samples = 20ms × 44.1 samples/ms)
5. **Recognition:** Per 20ms tick: LP.analyze() → NN.run() → binary decode → Phoneme
6. **Temporal smoothing:** 3-point outlier filter (removes isolated single-frame phoneme flickers)
7. **Runtime:** Lookahead buffer dispatches PHONEME event in sync with audio

**Events:**
- `AMPLITUDE_SAMPLE` (100ms interval)
- `PHONEME` (20ms interval, configured to 50ms in AvatarAnimator)
- `PLAYING_COMPLETE`, `PLAYING_ERROR`, `PLAYING_START`

---

## 5. 3D Avatar System

### 5.1 Platform

- **3D Engine:** Away3D (Flash-based 3D library)
- **Animation:** caurina.transitions.Tweener (tweening engine)
- **Model format:** Collada (`.dae`) via Away3D's Collada parser
- **Texture format:** JPEG (eye, teeth, body textures)

### 5.2 Model Import (`AvatarModelProvider`)

- **Scaling factor:** 10.5
- **Material mapping:** DAE internal names → embedded textures
  - `"texture_jpg"` → body texture
  - `"eye_jpg"` → eye texture
  - `"teeth_jpg_001"` → teeth texture
- **Sex constants:** MALE, FEMALE (default female)

### 5.3 Facial Features

**14 bones** in the mouth/face system (`AvatarMouth`):

| # | Feature | Role |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | `jaw` | Jaw rotation |
| 2 | `tongue` | Tongue movement |
| 3 | `mouth_r` | Right mouth corner |
| 4 | `mouth_l` | Left mouth corner |
| 5 | `lip_down_r` | Lower lip right |
| 6 | `lip_down_m` | Lower lip middle |
| 7 | `lip_down_l` | Lower lip left |
| 8 | `lip_top_r` | Upper lip right |
| 9 | `lip_top_m` | Upper lip middle |
| 10 | `lip_top_l` | Upper lip left |
| 11 | `cheek_r` | Right cheek |
| 12 | `cheek_l` | Left cheek |
| 13 | `cheekb_r` | Right cheekbone |
| 14 | `cheekb_l` | Left cheekbone |

**Eyes** (`AvatarEye`): eyelid, eyeball, inner eyebrow, outer eyebrow — per eye.
**Neck** (`AvatarNeck`): 2 segments — `neck_low` (rotZ, rotX only), `neck_high` (rotZ, rotX, rotY).

### 5.4 Bone Control Model

Each bone axis is wrapped in either `BoneRot` (rotation) or `BoneMov` (translation), implementing `BoneParameter` interface.

**Inertia blending formula:**
```
currentWeight = XML @inertia
nextWeight = 1.0 - currentWeight

value setter:
  bone.state *= currentWeight
  target = def + range * clamped_input  // input ∈ [-1, 1]
  bone.state += nextWeight * target
```

- inertia=0 → immediate response
- inertia=0.5 → half-life smoothing
- inertia=1.0 → frozen

**Tweener transitions used:** `"easeInOutSine"` (blink), `"easeOutCubic"` (lid close), `"linear"` (default for bone tweens)

### 5.5 Expressions & Emotions

**7 emotions:** neutral, joy, sadness, anger, fear, disgust, surprise
**N visemes:** 9 viseme groups, each with 14 ExpressionParameter multipliers (rot_x/y/z, mov_x/y/z per facial component)

All parameter values (ranges, multipliers) are stored in the missing `avatar_default.xml` file.

### 5.6 Blink System

- **Trigger:** Fixed-interval Timer (XML `blink_delay × 1000` ms) — no random variation
- **Blink sequence:** Close eyelid (easeInOutSine) → pause (blinkPause) → open eyelid (easeInOutSine)
- Both eyes blink simultaneously

### 5.7 Gaze System

```
Mouse → (400 - mouseX) / 400, (400 - mouseY) / 400  → normalized [-1, 1]
Eyes:   eyeball.rotX = posY, eyeball.rotY = posX   (direct, no inertia)
        eyebrow_i.movY = posY / 2.75
        eyebrow_o.movY = posY / 2.0
Neck:   low: rotZ=posX, rotX=-posY   /   high: rotZ=posX, rotX=-posY, rotY=posX
        Both neck segments receive posX/2, posY/2 (half eye range)
```

### 5.8 Hardcoded Animation Constants

| Constant | Value | Context |
|---|---|---|
| Amplitude → viseme multiplier | ×13.5 | AvatarAnimator maps audio amplitude to viseme intensity |
| Return to neutral tween | 0.5 seconds | After speech completes |
| LipsyncPlayer dispatch delay | 100ms | Amplitude sample interval |
| LipsyncPlayer initial volume | 1.0 | Full volume |
| Recognize phoneme delay | 50ms | Override of default 20ms (set in AvatarAnimator) |
| Motion inertia weight (XML) | per-axis configurable | Default 0.0 if XML missing |

---

## 6. Editor & Entry Points

### 6.1 LipsyncEditorWindow (main SWF)

- **Size:** 500 × 700, white background, 18fps, LOW quality
- **3D viewport:** AvatarScene (View3D), scaled 1.2×, offset (−70, −80)
- **Camera:** `moveTo(-50, 50, -50)`
- **Avatar position:** (0, −25, 0), rotated Y+15, X−5, Z+5

**UI controls** (all `util.Label` instances, Lucida Console 20pt, gray #555555, bold):
- `"AWATAR"` (y=20) — toggle female/male
- `"aeiou"`, `"count"`, `"example"`, `"lipsync"`, `"speech"` (y=80–200) — test audio playback

**Magnified face view:** 420×260 bitmap, 3.5× zoom from face coords (245, 230), Blur(3,3) + Glow(0x000000, 0.5, 20, 20) filters, updated every frame.

**Sex toggle mechanism:**
- Both avatars loaded at startup (female first, then male)
- Toggle swaps: currentAvatar, voiceUrl (`../lib/final/female/` ↔ `../lib/final/male/`), NN weights
- Default: female

**Foreground panel:** White rectangle 500×300 at (80, 350) — background for UI links.

### 6.2 Test Scenes

| Scene | SWF Size | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| ColladaTestScene | 800×800, black, 20fps | Full avatar + audio + viseme cycling |
| LipsyncTestScene | stage defaults | Console-only NN lip-sync test (no 3D) |
| SetupVisemeScene | 800×800, black, 20fps | Viseme fine-tuning with avatar |

All scenes load `avatar_default.xml` at runtime via URLLoader and refresh expressions every 1 second.

### 6.3 AvatarScene (`generic3D.AvatarScene`)

- Extends `away3d.containers.View3D`
- Auto-renders every frame via ENTER_FRAME
- No lights configured in base class
- Public methods: addAvatar(), removeAvatar()

---

## 7. Static Assets

### 7.1 Serialized Neural Network (`lib/network_image`)

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Size | 16,137 bytes |
| Format | zlib-compressed ByteArray (magic: `78 da` = standard deflate) |
| Schema | LP.order (int32) + outputCount (int32) + samplingDecimate (int32) + windowLength (int32) + momentum (double) + realLearningRate (double) + layers.length (int32) + per layer: neuron count (int32) + per neuron: value (double), bias (double), momentum (double), input count (int32) + per input: input_i (double), weight_i (double), momentum_i (double) |

### 7.2 Audio Files (10 MP3s)

| File | Male (bytes) | Female (bytes) |
|---|---|---|
| aeiou.mp3 | 36,152 | 30,092 |
| count.mp3 | 20,270 | 18,807 |
| example.mp3 | 48,900 | 44,720 |
| lipsync.mp3 | 51,616 | 46,392 |
| speech.mp3 | 60,603 | 59,976 |

### 7.3 Missing Assets (referenced via [Embed] but absent from repo)

| Directory | Expected Contents |
|---|---|
| `lib/lipsync/` | `network_image_m`, `network_image_f` (sex-specific NN weights) |
| `lib/xml/` | `avatar_default.xml` (avatar config: bone ranges, expression params, blink timing) |
| `lib/model/` | `model.dae` (female Collada), `model_man.dae` (male), `eye.jpg`, `teeth.jpg`, `texture.jpg`, `texture_m.jpg` |

**Total missing files:** 9 (2 NN binaries, 1 XML config, 2 DAE models, 4 JPG textures)

### 7.4 Audio Path Resolution

Editor loads audio from `../lib/final/[sex]/` — not from `../lib/male/` or `../lib/female/`. The `lib/male/` and `lib/female/` directories exist but use different paths from code.

Test scenes also reference `../lib/amy_aeiou.mp3` (ColladaTestScene, hardcoded).

The `typescript-migration` branch has:

- `typescript/tsconfig.json` (ES2020, ESNext modules, strict mode OFF)
- `typescript/webpack.config.js` (dev server port 3000, hot reload, HtmlWebpackPlugin)
- `typescript/src/index.ts` (629 lines — Phase 1: scene, camera, lights, model loader, procedural placeholder head, blink, mouth animation)
- `typescript/src/index.html` (dark-themed UI with file upload, model selector)

**Ported (Phase 1):** 3D scene, model loading (Collada/OBJ/GLTF), procedural avatar, blink, mouth animation
**Not ported:** LPC analysis, NN classification, phoneme/viseme mapping, audio sync, training system, avatar expression system

---

## 9. Key Technical Notes

### 9.1 Data Flow Summary

```
Audio file
  ↓ Sound.extract() + decimate (factor 7)
  ↓ Hamming window
  ↓ LP.analyze() → 9 reflection coefficients (Burg + Durbin-Levinson)
  ↓ NeuralNetwork.run() → 6 sigmoid outputs
  ↓ arrayToPhoneme (≥0.5 threshold) → Phoneme
  ↓ 3-point temporal smoothing filter
  ↓ LipsyncEvent.PHONEME
  ↓ ExpressionsCollection.getVisemeById(phoneme.visemeId)
  ↓ AvatarCore.setViseme(expression, amplitude × 13.5)
  ↓ AvatarMouth.setViseme(value, expression)
  ↓ 14x AvatarFeature.setParameter(value, expressionPart)
  ↓ 6x BoneRot/BoneMov (inertia-blended → Away3D Bone)
```

### 9.2 Configurable Parameters

All of the following are read from UI text fields at training time and persisted in the serialized network:
- LPC order (default 9)
- Output count / encoding bits (default 6)
- Sampling decimation factor (default 6)
- Window length (default 18ms)
- Recognize phoneme delay (default 20ms)
- Hidden neurons per layer
- Learning rate
- Epoch count
- Target MSE (default 0.02)

### 9.3 External Library Dependencies (not in repo)

- **Away3D** — 3D engine (Flash)
- **caurina.transitions.Tweener** — Tweening library
- **Adobe Flex MX** — MXML UI components (for LipsyncCreator)
- **FlashDevelop AS3 class library** — referenced in build path under `D:\Program Files (x86)\FlashDevelop\Library\AS3\classes`

### 9.4 Utility Layer Summary

| Class | Role | Key Methods |
|---|---|---|
| `NeuralNetworkProvider` | Embed/deserialize NN binaries | `getNetwork()` → male, `build(imageClass)` → generic |
| `AvatarXMLProvider` | Embed/parse avatar config XML | Constructor parses embedded XML |
| `DAECompressor` | Build-time Collada deflation tool | Constructor prompts download of compressed `.dae` |
| `AvatarDebugger` | Static trace logging | `log()`, `debug()`, `error()` |
| `LookAtPoint` | Exponential-moving-average gaze smoother | `lookAt(x, y)` |
| `Label` | Clickable text label component | `onMouseClick(handler)` |
